examples: The altarpiece should not be so gaudy.
The intricate detail of a rococo altarpiece.
In 1585, Annibale completed an altarpiece of the Baptism of Christ for the church of San Gregorio in Bologna.
Michael, c. 1563-65, a fragment of an altarpiece, a marvel of loosely painted curls, tender expression and delectable color.
In woodcarver Li Bing-Gui's workshop, a magnificent gilded dragon altarpiece sat waiting to be transported to the village of Kaoshong.
